_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: A reappearance of merlin mRNA was observed, beginning at day 5, indicating degradation of siRNA, extrusion of plasmid, or overgrowth of cells
resourceName: neurofibromin 2 ON-TARGETplus SMARTpool siRNA (Dharmacon, Lafayette, CO)
details: Reappearance of merlin mRNA beginning at day 5 after single transfection, indicating siRNA degradation or dilution
